title: RemoteNetwork
description: RemoteNetwork schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma Access Configuration API

id.description: Unique identifier for the remote network.

region.description: Prisma Access compute region (e.g., us-east-1, eu-west-1).

license_type.description: License type assigned to this remote network.

spn_name.description: Service provider node name for the Prisma Access gateway location.

ecmp_load_balancing.description: Enable or disable ECMP load balancing.

subnets.description: Local subnets at the remote network site.
